params.name: Mutated Corn
params.source: Cornon fight from [[Altar#Relics and Gear|Dragon Wish "Give me something to eat"]].
params.description: This corn was enchanted by the Divine Dragon. Under special conditions, it could adapt to a combat form. Even if it's defeated, it would just dehydrate and shrivel up. Water it regularly and a miracle might happen someday!
params.ss1:
Per 5 Wonder Fungi eaten, Snail RUSH +1
Wonder Fungi used: 200/200
